name: provenance-addon
description: Self-contained, dependency-free provenance receipt addon for Code Engine MCP. Optional no-op sink + BoundaryAttest adapter hook.
author: Markus van Kempen <markus.van.kempen@gmail.com>

scripts.demo:all: node example.mjs && node demo-ce-deployment.mjs && node demo-multi-session.mjs && node demo-tamper-scenarios.mjs
